channel.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast
channel.description: In under 10 minutes, get the most important AI stories, distilled into sharp insights and real-world impact. No fluff. No jargon. Just what matters and what’s next.
channel.itunes:summary: In under 10 minutes, get the most important AI stories, distilled into sharp insights and real-world impact. No fluff. No jargon. Just what matters and what’s next.
channel.itunes:author: Helix

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - April 5, 2026
item.description: On this Sunday edition of Helix AI Daily, Lucy breaks down a massive week in artificial intelligence — from Anthropic’s Claude Mythos 5 (a 10-trillion-parameter model) and its desktop AI agents, to Google DeepMind’s Gemini 3.1, OpenAI’s GPT-5.4, the $250B SpaceX-xAI acquisition, and Anthropic’s controversial ban on OpenClaw and third-party agents. Plus, the AI Pulse segment dives into AI for Learning — covering Kyron Learning’s $14.6M raise, Singapore’s new AI in Higher Education committee, and the Coursera vs. Brookings debate on AI’s real impact in classrooms.
item.content:encoded: On this Sunday edition of Helix AI Daily, Lucy breaks down a massive week in artificial intelligence — from Anthropic’s Claude Mythos 5 (a 10-trillion-parameter model) and its desktop AI agents, to Google DeepMind’s Gemini 3.1, OpenAI’s GPT-5.4, the $250B SpaceX-xAI acquisition, and Anthropic’s controversial ban on OpenClaw and third-party agents. Plus, the AI Pulse segment dives into AI for Learning — covering Kyron Learning’s $14.6M raise, Singapore’s new AI in Higher Education committee, and the Coursera vs. Brookings debate on AI’s real impact in classrooms.
item.itunes:title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - April 5, 2026
item.itunes:summary: On this Sunday edition of Helix AI Daily, Lucy breaks down a massive week in artificial intelligence — from Anthropic’s Claude Mythos 5 (a 10-trillion-parameter model) and its desktop AI agents, to Google DeepMind’s Gemini 3.1, OpenAI’s GPT-5.4, the $250B SpaceX-xAI acquisition, and Anthropic’s controversial ban on OpenClaw and third-party agents. Plus, the AI Pulse segment dives into AI for Learning — covering Kyron Learning’s $14.6M raise, Singapore’s new AI in Higher Education committee, and the Coursera vs. Brookings debate on AI’s real impact in classrooms.

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - April 4, 2026
item.description: On today’s Saturday episode, Lucy covers Google’s Gemma 4 open model launch, Anthropic’s Claude Mythos 5 and code leak drama, OpenAI’s $122B raise and Sora shutdown, SpaceX acquiring xAI for $250B, Mistral’s $830M debt round, Oracle’s mass layoffs for AI infrastructure, and an AI that now writes peer-reviewed science. Plus — the AI Pulse segment spotlights AI for Fun: Suno AI, Quick Draw!, and Google Veo.
item.content:encoded: On today’s Saturday episode, Lucy covers Google’s Gemma 4 open model launch, Anthropic’s Claude Mythos 5 and code leak drama, OpenAI’s $122B raise and Sora shutdown, SpaceX acquiring xAI for $250B, Mistral’s $830M debt round, Oracle’s mass layoffs for AI infrastructure, and an AI that now writes peer-reviewed science. Plus — the AI Pulse segment spotlights AI for Fun: Suno AI, Quick Draw!, and Google Veo.
item.itunes:title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - April 4, 2026
item.itunes:summary: On today’s Saturday episode, Lucy covers Google’s Gemma 4 open model launch, Anthropic’s Claude Mythos 5 and code leak drama, OpenAI’s $122B raise and Sora shutdown, SpaceX acquiring xAI for $250B, Mistral’s $830M debt round, Oracle’s mass layoffs for AI infrastructure, and an AI that now writes peer-reviewed science. Plus — the AI Pulse segment spotlights AI for Fun: Suno AI, Quick Draw!, and Google Veo.

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Thursday, April 2, 2026
item.description: OpenAI hits an $852B valuation in a record mega-funding round. A federal judge rules against the Trump administration’s mass deportations, and the Supreme Court weighs in. Meanwhile, Google debuts NotebookLM Plus with agentic research tools, Meta releases Llama 4 Scout and Maverick with cutting-edge multimodal and efficiency features, and a new wave of AI coding assistants threatens traditional software development roles. Today’s AI Pulse: AI for Productivity — covering Notion AI, Grammarly, and Microsoft 365 Copilot.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI hits an $852B valuation in a record mega-funding round. A federal judge rules against the Trump administration’s mass deportations, and the Supreme Court weighs in. Meanwhile, Google debuts NotebookLM Plus with agentic research tools, Meta releases Llama 4 Scout and Maverick with cutting-edge multimodal and efficiency features, and a new wave of AI coding assistants threatens traditional software development roles. Today’s AI Pulse: AI for Productivity — covering Notion AI, Grammarly, and Microsoft 365 Copilot.
item.itunes:title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Thursday, April 2, 2026
item.itunes:summary: OpenAI hits an $852B valuation in a record mega-funding round. A federal judge rules against the Trump administration’s mass deportations, and the Supreme Court weighs in. Meanwhile, Google debuts NotebookLM Plus with agentic research tools, Meta releases Llama 4 Scout and Maverick with cutting-edge multimodal and efficiency features, and a new wave of AI coding assistants threatens traditional software development roles. Today’s AI Pulse: AI for Productivity — covering Notion AI, Grammarly, and Microsoft 365 Copilot.

item.title: Helix.AI Daily Podcast - Wednesday, April 1, 2026
item.description: On this Wednesday April 1st episode of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, Lucy covers a packed news day including OpenAI’s major strategic pivot — discontinuing the Sora API to focus on robotics world simulation while freezing the Disney partnership. Also: Anthropic raises $3.5B at a $61.5B valuation, Meta’s Llama 4 drops as open-source multimodal, xAI launches Grok 3.5 as a reasoning model, and Google DeepMind’s AlphaFold 3 now covers RNA and small molecules. AI Pulse highlights AI for Health tools: Ada Health, Regard, and Butterfly Network’s iQ3.
item.content:encoded: On this Wednesday April 1st episode of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, Lucy covers a packed news day including OpenAI’s major strategic pivot — discontinuing the Sora API to focus on robotics world simulation while freezing the Disney partnership. Also: Anthropic raises $3.5B at a $61.5B valuation, Meta’s Llama 4 drops as open-source multimodal, xAI launches Grok 3.5 as a reasoning model, and Google DeepMind’s AlphaFold 3 now covers RNA and small molecules. AI Pulse highlights AI for Health tools: Ada Health, Regard, and Butterfly Network’s iQ3.

item.itunes:summary: On this Wednesday April 1st episode of Helix.AI Daily Podcast, Lucy covers a packed news day including OpenAI’s major strategic pivot — discontinuing the Sora API to focus on robotics world simulation while freezing the Disney partnership. Also: Anthropic raises $3.5B at a $61.5B valuation, Meta’s Llama 4 drops as open-source multimodal, xAI launches Grok 3.5 as a reasoning model, and Google DeepMind’s AlphaFold 3 now covers RNA and smal
